feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Tolerance defined 0 in the delivery
entry.content: the tolerance in the delivery doc. = 0. although the quantity of the delivery item is bigger than in the same item in the order. How can it be ?

entry.title: F110 Automatic Vendor Bank Selection for ACH/Wire Payments Across Multiple Company Codes
entry.content: Vendor has multiple bank accounts (ACH and Wire) maintained in vendor master data. The same vendor is used across multiple company codes. Invoice posting is being automated through OCR/AI, so manual selection of Partner Bank Type (BVTYP) is no longer reliable. We need SAP ECC F110 to automatically determine the correct vendor bank account based on company code and/or payment method. Is there a standard configuration available before considering a custom enhancement?

entry.title: Posting rules in area 25 are different from area 01 for the asset.
entry.content: While testing getting the error “Posting rules in area 25 are different from area 01” for the Asset class AC030100 under the company code SIN for the Asset 30000001102 Capitalized on 01.03.2026.

entry.title: Multiple capacity planner groups in 1 work center
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have an urgent question: Is it possible to manage the factory work load like this, that we see 1 work center in 2 capacity planner groups? Can I link two MRP controllers to a single work center? I need to be able to see the production orders from both MRP controllers in the capacity planning (CM01 capacity leveling), but I would rather not change the MRP controller.

Thank you in advance for your answers!

Kind regards,

Manuel

entry.title: Adv_ICo Sales_Configuration : movement type determination in Value Chain Monitoring
entry.content:
received error while configuring : Adv_ICo Sales_Configuration :  movement type determination in Value Chain Monitoring.

Error message : our input for the field Issuing Valuated Stock in Transit is not allwd. Message No. SD_SLS_INTERCOMPANY730

Reference Document : Adv_ICo Sales_Configuration Guide : OP 2022

entry.title: number range for the Object RV_SAMMG reaching critical zone
entry.content:
Dear forum,

In our EWA reporting, basis has shared the below critical message appearing in our Production Environment:

Number range for the Object RV_SAMMG reaching critical zone (95% currently).

Could you please advise us what action should we take?

 

Regards,

Gopal Turaga

entry.title: number range for the Object RV_SAMMG reaching critical zone
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

EWA report in our Production SAP System is giving the message:  number range for the Object RV_SAMMG reaching critical zone

Please advise what action we need to take.

Regards,

gopal turaga

entry.title: ERROR AU 133 ASSET
entry.content:
Standard Transaction F-43:
1. POSITION) MOVEMENT 100 ON ASSET 130
2. POSITION) SUPPLIER

RECORDING ATTACHED.
ERROR AU133 IS TRIGGERED ON AREA 50.
THE ASSET DOES NOT HAVE AREA 50.

AREA 50 IS DISABLED FOR THE ASSET CLASS.

WAITING AN URGENT RESOLUTION.
THANK YOU.

BR

entry.title: Input must be in the format ___.___.__~,__V
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Hope you are doing great!

We are creating sales order using inbound idoc, IDOC is failing with error status 51 with error: Input must be in the format ___.___.__~,__V

When we run in foreground its getting struck at Sales order Condition screen where condition type is not getting picked. Due to which idoc is failing and may be its checking Value format and finally throwing the error message in subject. This is happening in Quality system MA1 CLNT 400.

Please find the screenshots for reference.

entry.title: UD Reversal at Warehouse
entry.content: UD Reversal is not possible at Warehouse level

entry.title: Real Time Integration Badi for Order type filter in ECC - Reconciliation job
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to find badi in ECC to filter planned orders by order type while the IBP application job for Reconciliation is running.

Below are my observations:

Extractor job cif_ccr_read_order_ibp in ECC is triggering for Reconciliation job in IBP.
Badi  CIF_CCR_ORDER_FLT_OBJ_IBP  is getting triggered, but no order data to filter.
Could not find a way to filter the orders based on the order type.

Please suggest is there any way(badi/exit,etc..) to filter Orders by Order type.

Thanks,
Suresh

entry.title: Auto dunning run using standard program is not picking only few open items.
entry.content: Auto dunning run using standard program is not picking only few open items.

entry.title: Query – Mass Maintenance of Storage Location Addresses in SAP
entry.content:
We have a business requirement to maintain/update addresses for approximately 500 storage locations in SAP.

Since maintaining the address manually for each storage location would be time-consuming and prone to errors, kindly suggest the best approach for mass maintenance/upload of storage location addresses.

entry.title: SAP FBL5N NOT DISPLAYING THE CORRECT CONTRACT NUMBER IN REFERENCE KEY 2 FIELD
entry.content: SAP FBL5N NOT DISPLAYING THE CORRECT CONTRACT NUMBER IN REFERENCE KEY 2 FIELD

entry.title: Official ABAP MCP Server for AI Integration
entry.content:
Currently we're doing analysis and testing in integrating ABAP MCP on Eclipse to connect to our sandbox system.
It seems that the MCP server offered SAP is limited since AI cant edit existing object (although we can create new one).

I have tried community MCP server and it was able to do it. are there any way ABAP MCP tool for editing can be enabled?
was it disabled in purpose to prevent premature / accidental damage to existing objects.

entry.title: The InfoSet ZHR2_XJ_PA_ADHOC is not being generated in transaction SQ02.
entry.content:
During the InfoSet generation process, the system checks the TRDIR table for the following entry:

  • NAME = AQIO==ZHR2_XJ_PA_ADHOC
  • SUBC = 1

However, no corresponding entry exists in the TRDIR table for this combination. As a result, the generation process does not proceed further, and the InfoSet is not generated.

entry.title: ME55 - Deleted Line Item Value Not Updated to Zero in Purchase requisition.
entry.content:
Component- MM-PUR-REQ

After the line item deleted from ME52N, PR value does not change to Zero and total value showing same as before.

entry.title: User unable to move the stock to unrestricted stock.
entry.content:
User unable to perform QA11 getting error “Change the inspection stock of material 3305-01-026 in QM only”

Steps performed by user:

  • Created PR
  • Created PO w.r.t to PR
  • QA11 posted mistakenly for 553 movement type.
  • To reverse the 553-user posted 554 through MB11.

 

Now user is trying to post QA11 to get the material in unrestricted stock but facing above error.

entry.title: SLT replication after the export/import of SAP SLT system
entry.content:
SLT replication after the export/import of SAP SLT system.

What are the steps needed to replicate the tabales after the migration of SAP SLT SYSTEM without doing the full load/initial

entry.title: Vendor is not selected based on the Fixed vendor check box in the source List
entry.content: Source list has multiple active vendors within the same validity periods with MRP relevance = 1 for both vendors and Fixed vendor check box is ticked for one vendor. Expectation is that when the MRP creates the Purchase requisitions, it picks the vendor which has fixed indicator checked. But MRP is not following this logic.
